integration: Alchemy NFT API v3 owned NFTs

evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Endpoints use v3 paths (eth-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/nft/v3/{apiKey}/getNFTsForOwner and getFloorPrice) consistently; pageKey pagination and media extraction logic are internally consistent. docs_unavailable=true so long-tail handling applies; consistent with version claim → 4.
evidence.executability: main.py uses asyncio.gather but never imports asyncio → NameError at runtime. Also mutates shared params dict across pagination loop (works but fragile). Tests use monkeypatch on alchemy_client module functions, but main.py imports them by name so patching the module attribute won't affect main's bound references — test would still hit real API. Multiple non-obvious fixes.
evidence.completeness: (a) API key acquisition URL present; (b) pip install bash block present; (c) .env template with ALCHEMY_API_KEY present and matches settings; (d) backend code in fenced blocks; (e) frontend N/A for FastAPI-only; (f) test command implied via pytest but no explicit 'pytest' bash command under a Test heading. Env var names consistent.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official alchemy.com/docs and fastapi.tiangolo.com URLs placed inline near relevant code sections; canonical domains used.

rubric_notes: Missing 'import asyncio' in main.py is a clear executability bug; monkeypatch strategy is incorrectly applied (should patch app.main references). No explicit test command block.
